scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && ENV=development python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && pytest tests/ -v
scripts.install:all: cd my-app && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../ipad_app && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
